hypothesis: A capped ExECT S3 monolithic label-policy run extends frozen S2 v1.3 bridges to birth history, onset, epilepsy cause, and when diagnosed without changing S2 scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates the ExECT S3 nine-family program contract only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S3 diagnostics (S2 + four JSON entity families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across nine families is not comparable to frozen S2 five-family headlines.
S2 label-policy bridges from frozen v1.3 are reused for S1 and S2 families; see docs/exect_s3_phase1_overlap_policy.md.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
